title: PvP Modpack
body:
A lightweight PvP-focused modpack for Minecraft 1.21, designed for maximum performance and ultra-smooth gameplay. This pack enhances your PvP experience with fluid animations, customizable and informative HUDs, and detailed buff and armor indicators helping you stay aware and react faster during fights. Every included mod is carefully chosen to minimize input delay, reduce frame drops, and keep your FPS stable even on large, high player count servers.

Whether you’re dueling, playing Bedwars, or competing in large scale PvP events, this modpack ensures lightweight performance, clean visuals, and a competitive edge without unnecessary extras. Built for players who want speed, clarity, and control nothing more, nothing less.

More Mods coming soon

---


### Notes:          
Combat Hitboxes – Normal hitboxes must be activated: Press F3 + B.                  
VulkanMod – Requires up-to-date GPU drivers for optimal performance.
